**Coverage notes:** AAAI 2024 remains pending, and tracks\_checked must be read as a partial main-paper screen rather than a full-universe main audit. The main/non-workshop audit maps all 21 OJS issue containers 576-596 but retains seven exact blocker groups: Technical Tracks issues 576-593 need a complete article-and-abstract screen; issue 594 needs its complete Safe, Robust and Responsible AI article-and-abstract screen; issue 595 needs its complete AI for Social Impact, Senior Member, New Faculty, and Journal Track article/section screen; issue 596 needs its complete IAAI, EAAI, Student Abstracts, Undergraduate Consortium, and Demonstrations article/section screen; and the Bridge, Demonstrations, and Student Abstracts/Posters programs each need complete title-and-author rosters and issue mappings. The five existing AAAI papers are a verified lower bound, not an exhaustive result. The cached official workshop list and schedule establish this exact W1-W35 ledger. W1 “Are Large Language Models Simply Causal Parrots?” (LLM-CP) — unresolved; missing complete accepted/contributed-paper roster with titles, ordered authors, acceptance status, and presentation type. W2 AI for Credible Elections: A Call To Action with Trusted AI — unresolved; missing organizer/program URL plus every accepted/contributed title and ordered author. W3 AI for Digital Human — unresolved; missing complete 2024 accepted oral/poster program with titles, ordered authors, and public artifacts. W4 AI for Education: Bridging Innovation and Responsibility — unresolved; missing complete AI4ED accepted/contributed-paper list or program with titles, ordered authors, and paper links. W5 AI in Finance for Social Impact — unresolved high-priority finance blocker; missing complete AIFinSI accepted-paper/program roster with every title, ordered author, acceptance status, presentation type, and public paper/forum URL. W6 AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering — unresolved; missing organizer/program URL plus complete accepted/contributed-paper roster with titles and ordered authors. W7 AI-based Planning for Cyber-Physical Systems (CAIPI) — unresolved; missing organizer/program URL plus complete accepted/contributed-paper roster with titles and ordered authors. W8 AIBED: Artificial Intelligence for Brain Encoding and Decoding — resolved as officially cancelled; no missing paper artifact. W9 Artificial Intelligence for Cyber Security (AICS) — unresolved; missing complete accepted/contributed-paper program with titles, ordered authors, presentation types, and public artifacts. W10 Artificial Intelligence for Operations Research — unresolved; missing complete AI-OR accepted-paper roster with titles, ordered authors, workshop acceptance/presentation status, and public paper links. W11 Artificial Intelligence for Time Series Analysis (AI4TS): Theory, Algorithms, and Applications — unresolved; missing complete AAAI-24 program or accepted-paper list with every title, ordered author, presentation type, and paper link. W12 Artificial Intelligence with Biased or Scarce Data — unresolved; missing complete accepted/contributed-paper program with titles, ordered authors, presentation types, and public artifacts. W13 Cooperative Multi-Agent Systems Decision-Making and Learning: From Individual Needs to Swarm Intelligence — unresolved; missing final organizer program/accepted-paper roster, ordered authors, presentation mapping, and hosted paper links. W14 Deployable AI (DAI) — unresolved; missing final accepted-paper roster, contributed-talk titles, poster titles, ordered authors, and public paper links. W15 Bootstrapping Developmental AIs: From Simple Competences to Intelligent Human-Compatible AIs — resolved as officially cancelled; no missing paper artifact. W16 EIW-III: The 3rd Edge Intelligence Workshop on Large Language and Vision Models — unresolved; missing final accepted-paper roster across both poster sessions, oral selections, ordered authors, and public paper links. W17 FACTIFY 3.0 – Workshop Series on Multimodal Fact-Checking and Hate Speech Detection — unresolved; missing official organizer/program URL plus complete accepted-paper roster, ordered authors, presentation mapping, and paper links. W18 Graphs and more Complex Structures For Learning and Reasoning (GCLR) — unresolved; missing final accepted-paper roster, poster titles, oral selections, ordered authors, and paper links. W19 Health Intelligence (W3PHIAI-24) — unresolved; missing final accepted full/short-paper, poster, demonstration, and special-track roster with ordered authors and paper links. W20 Human-Centric Representation Learning (HCRL) — unresolved; missing complete accepted-paper list, ordered authors, oral/poster mapping, and hosted paper links. W21 Imageomics: Discovering Biological Knowledge from Images using AI — unresolved; missing complete accepted-note list with decisions, titles, ordered authors, forum IDs, presentation types, and paper links. W22 Large Language Models for Biological Discoveries (LLMs4Bio) — unresolved; missing final program/accepted-paper roster with titles, ordered authors, presentation types, and linked manuscripts. W23 Learnable Optimization (LEANOPT) — unresolved; missing official organizer/program URL plus complete accepted-paper roster, ordered authors, presentation mapping, and paper links. W24 Machine Learning for Cognitive and Mental Health — unresolved; missing final accepted paper/poster titles, ordered authors, presentation mapping, and manuscript links. W25 Neuro-Symbolic Learning and Reasoning in the era of Large Language Models (NuCLeaR) — unresolved; missing complete accepted/contributed-paper roster with titles, ordered authors, forum/paper URLs, and presentation mapping. W26 Privacy-Preserving Artificial Intelligence — unresolved; missing accepted technical/short/position-paper roster with titles, ordered authors, presentation status, and public artifact URLs. W27 Public Sector Large Language Models: Algorithmic and Sociotechnical Design — unresolved; missing public accepted-submission list with titles, ordered authors, forum IDs, acceptance decisions/venues, presentation types, and paper links. W28 Recommendation Ecosystems: Modeling, Optimization and Incentive Design — unresolved; missing organizer/program URL plus complete accepted-paper roster with titles, ordered authors, and public artifacts. W29 Responsible Language Models (ReLM) — unresolved; missing complete accepted-paper/program list with titles, ordered authors, presentation types, and public paper URLs. W30 Scientific Document Understanding — unresolved; missing exact CEUR proceedings volume/index or organizer-hosted accepted-paper list with titles, ordered authors, presentation types, and paper URLs. W31 Sustainable AI — unresolved; missing accepted oral/poster roster with titles, ordered authors, presentation types, and public paper URLs. W32 Synergy of Reinforcement Learning and Large Language Models — unresolved; missing complete paper-presentation/poster roster with titles, ordered authors, acceptance status, and public artifacts. W33 Workshop on Ad Hoc Teamwork (WAHT) — unresolved; missing organizer/program URL plus complete accepted-paper roster with titles, ordered authors, presentation mapping, and public artifacts. W34 XAI4DRL: eXplainable Artificial Intelligence for Deep Reinforcement Learning — unresolved; missing accepted long/short-paper list with titles, ordered authors, OpenReview forum IDs, acceptance decisions/venues, presentation mapping, and public artifacts. Final workshop disposition is 2/35 resolved by official cancellation and 33/35 access-constrained unresolved because complete paper rosters are absent from the recovered evidence. This is not a demonstrated zero-eligible result or proof that current official/organizer sources are genuinely unavailable. No complete workshop roster was recovered, no AAAI workshop paper was verified for addition or exhaustive exclusion, and W5 remains the highest-priority blocker. Workshop therefore remains omitted from tracks\_checked; neither main nor workshop coverage is complete.

5 verified papers curated for direct relevance to quantitative finance and asset management. Tracks are separated so main-conference, position, and workshop status remains visible.

## Main Conference (5)

### [CI-STHPAN: Pre-trained Attention Network for Stock Selection with Channel-Independent Spatio-Temporal Hypergraph](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/28770>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-aaai-xia-ci-sthpan-stock-selection

**Authors:** Hongjie Xia, Huijie Ao, Long Li, Yu Liu, Sen Liu, Guangnan Ye, Hongfeng Chai

**Venue / year:** AAAI · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Alpha Modeling · Alternative Data

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** DOI 10.1609/aaai.v38i8.28770

**Focus:** Pre-trains temporal and hypergraph representations before ranking stocks across dynamic market relationships.

**Why it matters:** Converts multivariate market structure into stock selections that improve investment returns and Sharpe ratios.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/28770>) · [Paper](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/28770>)

---

### [EarnHFT: Efficient Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for High Frequency Trading](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29384>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-aaai-qin-earnhft

**Authors:** Molei Qin, Shuo Sun, Wentao Zhang, Haochong Xia, Xinrun Wang, Bo An

**Venue / year:** AAAI · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Execution · Market Regimes

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** DOI 10.1609/aaai.v38i13.29384

**Focus:** Routes among specialized second-level reinforcement-learning traders to execute cryptocurrency strategies across market regimes.

**Why it matters:** Makes high-frequency policies trainable over long trajectories while improving simulated profitability and regime robustness.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29384>) · [Paper](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29384>)

---

### [ECHO-GL: Earnings Calls-Driven Heterogeneous Graph Learning for Stock Movement Prediction](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29305>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-aaai-liu-echo-gl

**Authors:** Mengpu Liu, Mengying Zhu, Xiuyuan Wang, Guofang Ma, Jianwei Yin, Xiaolin Zheng

**Venue / year:** AAAI · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Alpha Modeling · Alternative Data · Financial Forecasting

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** DOI 10.1609/aaai.v38i12.29305

**Focus:** Builds dynamic heterogeneous stock relations from earnings calls to forecast price movements over multiple horizons.

**Why it matters:** Turns earnings-call information into signals that improve both prediction accuracy and trading profitability.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29305>) · [Paper](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29305>)

---

### [Market-GAN: Adding Control to Financial Market Data Generation with Semantic Context](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29531>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-aaai-xia-market-gan

**Authors:** Haochong Xia, Shuo Sun, Xinrun Wang, Bo An

**Venue / year:** AAAI · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Market Simulation · Synthetic Data · Evaluation

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** DOI 10.1609/aaai.v38i14.29531

**Focus:** Generates controllable financial-market time series conditioned on ticker, history state, and inferred market dynamics.

**Why it matters:** Provides context-aligned synthetic market scenarios for testing forecasts, risk models, and investment strategies.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29531>) · [Paper](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29531>)

---

### [MDGNN: Multi-Relational Dynamic Graph Neural Network for Comprehensive and Dynamic Stock Investment Prediction](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29381>)

**Catalog ID:** 2024-aaai-qian-mdgnn-stock-investment

**Authors:** Hao Qian, Hongting Zhou, Qian Zhao, Hao Chen, Hongxiang Yao, Jingwei Wang, Ziqi Liu, Fei Yu, Zhiqiang Zhang, Jun Zhou

**Venue / year:** AAAI · 2024

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-11

**Topics:** Alpha Modeling · Alternative Data · Financial Forecasting

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** DOI 10.1609/aaai.v38i13.29381

**Focus:** Encodes evolving multi-relational stock graphs with a Transformer to predict investment outcomes.

**Why it matters:** Captures changing links among stocks and related entities that static investment models miss.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29381>) · [Paper](<https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/29381>)
